sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99952" key="suneklekto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-λεκτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n99952.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chosen along with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg021.perseus-grc1:5:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Pet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
